sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107081" key="u(pekphda/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεκ-πηδάω</orth>, <sense id="n107081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spring out from under,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
